title: Summarize Meeting
description: Generate a structured summary from a Zoom meeting transcript
prompt: Summarize the latest Zoom meeting. Include: key discussion points, decisions made, action items with owners and deadlines, and overall sentiment.

title: Extract Action Items
description: Pull all action items from a meeting with owners and priorities
prompt: Extract all action items from the most recent meeting. Format each with: action, owner, priority (high/medium/low), and deadline if mentioned.

title: Client Meeting Digest
description: Weekly digest of all client meetings
prompt: Create a weekly digest of all client meetings from the past 7 days. Group by client, include key decisions and outstanding action items.

title: Follow-up Email
description: Draft a follow-up email from meeting notes
prompt: Draft a follow-up email for the [CLIENT] meeting. Include: summary of what was discussed, decisions made, action items assigned, and next steps.
